aliases.copilot-full: eval "$(ssh-agent -s)" 2>/dev/null; ssh-add --apple-use-keychain ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 2>/dev/null || true; export GH_TOKEN=$(/opt/homebrew/bin/gh auth token) && /Users/david/.local/bin/copilot --yolo --no-ask-user

functions.qq: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to set quitapps to name of every application process whose visible is true and name is not "Finder"' -e 'repeat with appName in quitapps' -e 'try' -e 'tell application appName to quit' -e 'end try' -e 'end repeat'
functions.qq!: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to set quitapps to name of every application process whose visible is true and name is not "Finder"' -e 'repeat with appName in quitapps' -e 'try' -e 'do shell script "killall " & quoted form of appName' -e 'end try' -e 'end repeat'
